reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicio más del Automóvil Club Argentino. Buena atención del playero. Lo único malo es que NO LE FUNCIONA EL POSNE DE CARGA DE PUNTOS. Me hizo un comprobante de la carga de combustible, pero no paso por la zona en forma frecuente.

(Translated by Google)
Another service station for the Argentine Automobile Club. The attendant was helpful. The only downside is that the card reader for refueling points isn't working. He gave me a receipt for the fuel, but I don't drive through that area often.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15679973824289135347/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJMzc3dDlRRRAB
